reviews.review_description: Honestly this is my favorite game right. And I play it every day I can but theses few weeks I have been playing have been a roller coaster so basically I get ban from this game every other week because supposedly i been cheating? But I didn’t cheat this moder was making every one tagged than not tagged and I told everyone to leave or you get banned and guess what I get banned for the moder choices! Like what? And a few days ago I had a problem with ADMIN! They kept spamming reports on me because I told him not to the sound that said the n word and I reported him and then I get banned the next day so when I get it back 2 days later am like yes finally! And am doing nothing but playing the game then the lime green gorilla comes in and makes probably everyone banned and am like WHYYYYYYYYY please fix’s this problem I see why people get ban every day bc of this stupidness please fix’s!!!!! Am still gonn rate 4 bc it is my fav game but fix this bc me and my friends wanna play but we get banned like every other week!

I downloaded ￼ it because of the mods but the other day my friend wasn’t able to get onto gorilla tag so I told him to download it and we play together it was really fun great game 

But the only problem is, there’s a lot of toxicity and a lot of people threaten to get you banned for even just not changing your name from gorilla and a bunch of numbers to something else because it breaks the rules 

By the way, that happened to me the other day ￼￼￼￼
